posts.author: paigenewton (Paige)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add an option to import a PDF as the “background” of a WorkCanvas. Also have option for smaller task icons instead of full tasks.

What are you trying to achieve

We (construction admin) currently use Fieldwire to add interactive tasks to our blueprints, but would love to integrate our prints with Monday and WorkCanvas seems like it’s almost there. The only other issue is that the way the tasks show up on the canvas is so large, having the option to use an icon as a task placeholder would be ideal.
